title: SEIF Event
description: Append-only, hash-chained event. The event log is the source of continuity; graph, memory, and read-models are DERIVED projections that may never rewrite it. Delivery is at-least-once; effects must be idempotent (see receipt.schema.json). `idempotency_key` MUST be unique per (stream, key) in the store; a duplicate append is a no-op recorded via a SKIPPED_DUPLICATE receipt. Do not promise exactly-once.

actor.description: neo | claude | codex | gemini | kernel | <service>. v0.1 identity = OS principal (Linux user + Tailscale); crypto-key identity -> NOT_IN_V0_1.

type.description: task.created | task.transition | artifact.produced | approval.requested | approval.granted | approval.denied | claim.asserted | claim.superseded | receipt.written | contradiction.opened

stream.description: event stream/log id; hash-chain + seq are per-stream

seq.description: monotonic per-stream sequence; with prev_hash prevents forks/replay

idempotency_key.description: dedup key for at-least-once delivery; unique per (stream, key)

retry_of.description: event id this is a retry of

prev_hash.description: sha256 of the prior event in this stream

hash.description: sha256 over the canonicalized event excluding 'signature'

signature.description: v0.1: optional sha256 attestation. ML-DSA-65 -> NOT_IN_V0_1.
